footer.tagline: Trusted by 531+ businesses across the UK since 2007.

home.h1: Premium VoIP, Fully AI Powered Digital Marketing & Web Solutions for UK Businesses
home.lead: KomTek delivers enterprise-grade telephony, data-driven digital marketing, and professional web development — all from one trusted UK team. 531+ happy clients. 15+ years of expertise.
home.services_lead: Whether you need reliable phone systems, more customers online, or a powerful website, KomTek has you covered.
home.voip_p: Cloud-hosted VoIP for homes and businesses. Crystal-clear calls, 99.999% uptime, and coverage across 78 countries.
home.marketing_p: AI-powered SEO, Google Ads, social media, and more — engineered to grow your online presence and drive qualified leads.
home.design_p: Beautiful, fast, mobile-first websites and e-commerce stores built to convert visitors into customers.
home.cta_p: Join 531+ UK businesses that trust KomTek for their telephony, digital marketing, and web development needs.
home.trusted_h2: A Trusted Partner for Your Business Technology
home.trusted_p: We combine deep technical expertise with genuine care for our clients — delivering results that matter.
home.why1_p: Operating since 2007, we've built deep knowledge across telecom, digital marketing, and web development.
home.why2_p: UK data centre redundancy and multi-node network architecture keep your communications always online.
home.why3_p: Make and receive calls in 78 countries with 3,723 area codes — perfect for international businesses.
home.why4_p: No hidden fees, no nasty surprises. Clear pricing with flexible monthly payment plans on larger projects.
home.why5_p: A dedicated team of telecoms engineers, marketers, designers, and developers ready to support your growth.
home.why6_p: Reach us by phone, email, or WhatsApp. Our support team is on hand to resolve issues fast.
home.clients_label: Trusted by businesses across London & the UK

voip_page.h1: VoIP Phone Systems for Homes & Businesses
voip_page.lead: Enterprise-grade cloud telephony without the enterprise price tag.
voip_page.home_p: Replace your traditional landline with a crystal-clear, cost-effective VoIP connection.
voip_page.home_h3_p: Save on line rental while gaining professional phone features.
voip_page.biz_p: A fully featured cloud-hosted phone system for small businesses, SMEs, and enterprises.
voip_page.biz_h3_p: Trusted by 531+ businesses across the UK and internationally.
voip_page.features_lead: All KomTek VoIP plans share the same powerful underlying platform — no feature-gating of essentials.
voip_page.feat1_p: The Komtek Communicator app turns any smartphone, tablet, or PC into a fully featured office phone with caller ID, transfer, and on-hold.
voip_page.feat2_p: Your calls and data are hosted in UK-based, ISO-certified data centres with multi-node redundancy and full encryption.
voip_page.feat3_p: Present a local number in any of 78 countries. Choose from 3,723 area codes to build trust with customers wherever you trade.
voip_page.cta_h2: Ready to Switch to Smarter Telephony?
voip_page.cta_p: Talk to our VoIP specialists — free consultation, no commitment.

marketing_page.h1: Digital Marketing Services That Drive Real Results
marketing_page.lead: From first-page Google rankings to AI-powered social media campaigns.
marketing_page.seo_p: SEO is the most cost-effective way to win customers online.
marketing_page.seo_vis_p: Results typically improve within 3 months. The longer you invest, the more authority your site builds.
marketing_page.social_p: AI-enhanced content creation and trend-reactive campaigns across all major platforms.
marketing_page.social_vis_p: Consistent, on-brand content across every major social platform.
marketing_page.ads_p: Precision-targeted paid search campaigns that put your business in front of ready-to-buy customers.
marketing_page.ads_vis_p: Every campaign is tailored to your specific goals and budget.
marketing_page.gbp_p: 85% of customers search online before visiting a local business.
marketing_page.gbp_vis_p: Appear in the Google Local Pack — the map results shown above organic listings.
marketing_page.spotify_p: Reach millions of active listeners with targeted audio, video, and display ads.
marketing_page.spotify_vis_h: Reach Listeners at the Right Moment
marketing_page.spotify_vis_p: Ads delivered during active listening sessions drive higher engagement than passive formats.
marketing_page.cta_h2: Ready to Grow Your Online Presence?
marketing_page.cta_p: Get a free digital marketing audit — we'll identify exactly what's holding you back.

design_page.h1: Website Design, Development & IT Support for UK Businesses
design_page.web_design_p: Stunning, user-friendly websites built to convert visitors into customers.
design_page.web_design_vis_p: We design for the platform that best fits your needs and budget.
design_page.web_dev_p: Robust, scalable websites and web applications built to perform.
design_page.web_dev_vis_p: Enterprise-grade technologies chosen to fit your project's exact requirements.
design_page.ecom_p: Sell smarter. Grow faster. Scale globally.
design_page.ecom_vis_p: We develop on the platform that best matches your sales volume, budget, and growth plans.
design_page.cms_p: Content made simple. Websites made powerful.
design_page.cms_vis_p: Choose a CMS that matches your content needs and technical comfort level.
design_page.it_vis_p: Proactive IT management so you can focus on running your business.
design_page.cta_p: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you with a free, no-obligation quote.

about_page.h1: We Are Increasing Business Success With Technology
about_page.lead: KomTek is a UK-based global provider of VoIP telephony, digital marketing, and web development.
about_page.story_p1: KomTek was founded with a single mission: to give businesses of every size access to enterprise-grade technology without the enterprise price tag. What started as a UK-focused VoIP provider has grown into a full-service technology company serving clients across the UK and globally.
about_page.story_p2: Today, our 250+ team of telecoms engineers, digital marketers, web developers, and IT specialists work together to help businesses communicate better, market smarter, and operate more efficiently.
about_page.story_p3: We're proud to be a performance leader in the telecommunications and IT industry — achieving operational excellence while keeping costs transparent and customer support genuinely responsive.
about_page.values_lead: From how we price our services to how we respond when things go wrong — our values aren't on a poster. They're in how we work.
about_page.val1_p: 99.999% VoIP uptime. Monthly performance reporting. We hold ourselves accountable with numbers, not promises.
about_page.val2_p: No hidden fees. No locked-in contracts that don't serve you. Our pricing is clear and our reporting is honest.
about_page.val3_p: Your growth is our KPI. We measure success not by hours billed, but by the results we deliver for your business.
about_page.metrics_lead: Client satisfaction across our three core service areas — measured continuously against real outcomes.
about_page.cta_p: Find out how KomTek can help you communicate better, market smarter, and operate more efficiently.

contact_page.lead: We're here to help. Reach us by phone, email, or the form below.
contact_page.form_intro: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contact_page.map_h2: Find Us in Golders Green, London
contact_page.success_p: Thank you for getting in touch. We'll respond within one business day.
contact_page.whatsapp: Prefer to message? Reach us on WhatsApp for quick responses during business hours.
